_legend: all dummy — plausible SAO initiatives. Replace with real programs when available.
heading: Major Initiatives
intro: Focused programs the SAO runs to improve student life year on year.

items.title: Student Buddy Programme
items.body: Pairs every incoming student with a senior mentor for a smooth first semester.

items.title: Mind Matters — Wellness Drive
items.body: Campus-wide mental-health awareness, counselling camps and stress-relief weeks during exams.

items.title: One-Window Help Desk
items.body: A single physical + online desk for hostel, fee, ID and grievance queries.

items.title: Green Campus & Sustainability
items.body: Student-led waste segregation, cycle-sharing and energy-saving drives in hostels.

items.title: Inclusion & Accessibility Push
items.body: Accessible facilities audit and support services for students with disabilities.

items.title: Alumni–Student Connect
items.body: Mentorship and career talks linking students with IIT Patna alumni.
